lessons.title: Describe Azure compute services
lessons.content_md:
Introduction to Azure compute services (virtual machines, containers, Azure Functions), application hosting options, and AI/ML and IoT/Edge service categories.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/describe-azure-compute-networking-services/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Describe Azure networking services
lessons.content_md:
Introduction to core Azure networking services, including virtual networks, VPN Gateway, ExpressRoute, and Azure DNS.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/describe-azure-networking-services/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Describe Azure storage services
lessons.content_md:
Azure storage services, tiers, redundancy options, and migration options and tools.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/describe-azure-storage-services/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Describe Azure identity, access, and security

Describe Azure identity, access, and security

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Introduction to Cloud Infrastructure: Describe Azure architecture and services
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Introduction to Cloud Infrastructure: Describe Azure architecture and services**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
